title: conopodium pyrenaeum subsp. pumilum
intro: Conopodium pyrenaeum subsp. pumilum, a sub-species of the Conopodium pyrenaeum plant, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Apiaceae. It is also known as small meadow parsley or dwarf meadow parsley. The medicinal properties of Conopodium pyrenaeum subsp. pumilum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. This plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, and its herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and salves.
